title: YouTube Strategy
intro: YouTube gives CalmCove a format for longer guided experiences, deeper storytelling, and search-friendly educational content.
whyItFits: The platform supports repeat viewing behavior, habit-driven content, and emotionally calming formats that are difficult to deliver fully in short-form social media alone.

concepts.title: Study With Me: Calm Focus Session
concepts.purpose: Provide a practical focus tool while positioning CalmCove as a brand that improves study quality.
concepts.targetViewer: Students seeking a calmer environment for homework, revision, or essay writing.
concepts.keyMessage: Focus does not need to feel intense to be effective. Calm structure creates better concentration.
concepts.cta: Use CalmCove for your next study block
concepts.storyboardAlt: Storyboard visual for the CalmCove Study With Me focus session.

concepts.title: 7 Day Calm Reset Challenge Intro
concepts.purpose: Introduce the campaign concept, explain the daily challenge structure, and motivate audience participation.
concepts.targetViewer: Young adults who want a low-pressure way to build a healthier mental reset habit.
concepts.keyMessage: Small resets done consistently can change how your week feels.
concepts.cta: Join the challenge and share your day one reset
concepts.storyboardAlt: Storyboard visual for the Calm Reset Challenge introduction.
